messages.content:
随着经济快速发展，全球制造业呈现出蓬勃发展态势，制造业产业结构持续优化升级。在制造业发展过程中，如何挺高生产效率成为企业关注的焦点问题，重载AGV（自动导向车，Automated Guided Vehicle）凭借其高效率、低成本等优势，逐渐成为工业生产的重要技术设备之一。
重载AGV主要应用在重型设备（货物）的生产场景中，如机械加工、重工业、轨道交通、飞机制造、船舶、风力风电等行业。请用英文修改前面这段话。

With the rapid development of the economy, the global manufacturing industry is showing a booming trend, and the industrial structure of the manufacturing industry is continuously optimizing and upgrading. In the process of manufacturing industry development, how to improve production efficiency has become a focus of attention for enterprises. Heavy-duty AGVs (Automated Guided Vehicles), with their advantages of high efficiency and low cost, have gradually become important technical equipment in industrial production.
Heavy-duty AGVs are mainly used in production scenarios of heavy equipment (goods), such as machining, heavy industry, rail transportation, aircraft manufacturing, shipbuilding, wind power, and other industries.

成都航发机器人有限公司成立于2016年，位于中国四川省成都市，厂区面积约40亩，现有员工200余人，是一家专业从事移动机器人研发、生产及销售于一体的现代化企业，始终坚持走以新技术开发、新产品设计为导向的技术密集型企业之路。公司通过了ISO9001国际质量管理体系认证，被评为国家高新技术企业，四川省专精特新企业，现拥有各型专利四十余项。截至目前，航发机器人已在欧洲、俄罗斯等区域开展经销合作，公司计划在23年内陆续在北美、南美、日韩、东南亚等地区开拓市场。
我们的目标是让“HANGFA”航发成为世界机器人领域知名品牌。请用英文修改前面这段话。

Established in 2016, Chengdu Hangfa Robotics Co., Ltd. is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, China. Covering an area of approximately 40 acres, the company currently employs over 200 staff members. As a modern enterprise specialized in research, development, production, and sales of mobile robots, Hangfa Robotics has always been committed to the path of a technology-intensive enterprise guided by new technology development and new product design. The company has obtained ISO9001 international quality management system certification and has been recognized as a national high-tech enterprise and a specialized, high-tech and innovative enterprise in Sichuan Province. Currently, the company holds over forty patents of various types. Hangfa Robotics has engaged in distribution partnerships in Europe, Russia, and other regions. The company plans to expand its market presence in North America, South America, Japan, South Korea, Southeast Asia, and other areas in the coming years.
Our goal is to establish "HANGFA" as a renowned brand in the field of robotics worldwide.
1．核心产品：公司将为代理商提供具有核心竞争力的优势产品与核心技术。请用英文修改前面这段话。
1. Core Products: The company will provide agents with advantage products and core technologies that have competitive strength.
完善培训：公司将为合作伙伴提供技术支持、产品应用、调试要点与商务合同维度的全方位系统培训，以帮助合作伙伴更好掌握产品应用及售后调试服务.请用英文修改前面这段话。

Comprehensive Training: The company will provide partners with comprehensive system training in technical support, product applications, key debugging points, and business contract dimensions to assist partners in gaining better mastery of product applications and after-sales debugging services.
技术支持：公司将为合作伙伴提供项目方案与技术支持，在重点项目上，进行版随式跟进与全程技术与方案支持，同步解答客户疑点，共同推进项目落地；请用英文修改前面这段话。

Technical Support: The company will provide partners with project planning and technical support. For key projects, we will provide continuous technical and program support, addressing customer concerns and jointly promoting project implementation.
价格优势：公司将实行合作区域或合作行业的价格保护，与合作伙伴实现共创、共享、共赢；请用英文修改前面这段话。
Price Advantage: The company will implement price protection in the cooperative region or industry to achieve co-creation, sharing, and win-win cooperation with partners.
展会宣传：对于合作伙伴主导参与的地方性展览会议，公司也将提供宣传资料、物料设计、展会运营等多方面支持，确保合作伙伴的宣传与活动支撑力度

Exhibition Promotion: For local exhibitions and conferences where partners take the lead, the company will provide various forms of support, including promotional materials, material design, exhibition operation, and more, to ensure strong support for partner promotion and activities.
资金协助：公司将适时为合作伙伴提供授信支持，确保可持续合作
Financial Assistance: The company will provide timely credit support to partners, ensuring sustainable cooperation.
主推OmniTitan, OmniTurtle, OmniRhino, OmniAnt 四个系列的运输车产品和相关的非标准定制产品
We highly promote the OmniTitan, OmniTurtle, OmniRhino, and OmniAnt series of transportation vehicles, as well as related non-standard customized products.
